user.title: Add panel
user.description: Set up a new HomeTiles panel.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Panel discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: **{name}** ({model}) was found on the network at {host}. HomeTiles Bridge will send the MQTT credentials below to the panel; it will then restart. Host and port are prefilled automatically. Enter username and password if your MQTT broker requires login credentials.

error.topic_already_configured: A panel with this MQTT topic is already configured.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the panel. Check that it's still on the network and try again.
error.mqtt_host_required: Enter an MQTT host or IP address.
error.invalid_port: Enter a valid MQTT port between 1 and 65535.

abort.missing_device_id: The discovered device did not send a valid identifier.
abort.mqtt_not_configured: No MQTT integration is set up in Home Assistant. Please set up the MQTT integration first.
abort.unsupported_broker: The configured MQTT broker requires TLS or a client certificate, which the panel does not support. Please enter the broker credentials manually in the panel's web interface.
abort.mqtt_read_failed: Could not read the MQTT credentials.

entities.title: Entity configuration
entities.description: Applies to all panels. Changes here affect every connected device.

energy.title: Energy Dashboard
energy.description: Send data from the Home Assistant Energy Dashboard to devices.

error.invalid_scene_map: Aliases must follow the pattern alias=entity_id (one per line).
